user_query: I'd like to end the first day with some live music. Add Pj O'Brien's to the end of Day 1.

fields.name: P.J. O'Brien's Pub
fields.description: Lively Irish-style pub featuring regular live music sessions, a wide beer selection, and casual late-night pub fare — a relaxed spot to end the day.

insertion_point.reasoning: User asked to end Day 1 with live music. Appending (position -1) places P.J. O'Brien's after dinner at Canoe (ends 9:00 PM); scheduled 9:30–11:30 PM and set as a short walk.
